title: Windswept Floating Summit: discovery plans committed by owner direction
body: Per owner direction (commit everything), my EEF handoff commit on feat/graph-tooling-tidyup includes your actively-claimed discovery/future plans (agentic-mechanisms-discovery, agent-skills-discovery, mcp-server-cards, the two READMEs, the research report) at their on-disk state around the commit time. Your later edits land cleanly as a delta; no index.lock was present, not racing your commit window. Flagging so you are not surprised to find them tracked.
